meta.name: PRSM RECOVERY: Resume EmissionController minting
meta.description: Resumes EmissionController emissions after pauseMinting. Resume continues from lastMintTimestamp — no retroactive minting for the paused period. PRECONDITIONS for cosigning: (1) emission-bug patched if pause triggered by bug, (2) auditor sign-off on patch, (3) public resumption announcement queued, (4) reconcile expected emission accumulation during pause period vs. actual. Note: governance threshold (4-of-5).
